mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_name, work_start_time, work_end_time, center_longitude, center_latitude, allowed_radius, create_time FROM attendance_rule WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, rule_name, work_start_time, work_end_time, center_longitude, center_latitude, allowed_radius, create_time FROM attendance_rule ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, rule_name, work_start_time, work_end_time, center_longitude, center_latitude, allowed_radius, create_time FROM attendance_rule ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_rule (rule_name, work_start_time, work_end_time, center_longitude, center_latitude, allowed_radius, create_time) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{workStartTime}, #{workEndTime}, #{centerLongitude}, #{centerLatitude}, #{allowedRadius}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, work_start_time = #{workStartTime}, work_end_time = #{workEndTime}, center_longitude = #{centerLongitude}, center_latitude = #{centerLatitude}, allowed_radius = #{allowedRadius} WHERE id = #{id}
